programme.title: The Invitation

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.desc: A journalist sets a challenge to the leader of a society of hired killers. Period comedy thriller, starring Diana Rigg, Oliver Reed and Telly Savalas

programme.desc: An industrialist's mysterious death prompts a curious Broadway director to try his hand at sleuthing. Murder mystery, with Gene Wilder and Mike Starr

programme.title: Guardians of the Tomb

programme.title: A Good Woman Is Hard To Find

programme.desc: Tom Wingo, an unemployed football coach from South Carolina, goes to New York to support his sister, a poet, who attempted suicide. She becomes involved with Susan Lowenstein, the psychiatrist who cares for her, but her marriage in crisis, her children and a terrible family secret disturb her mind.

programme.title: The Good Doctor

programme.desc: When the mythical host of a famous talk show, Katherine Newbury, is accused of not contributing to the female cause because she only works with men, she hires Molly, an inexperienced young woman of Indian origin to collaborate on the program.

programme.title: The Wrong Man (VO)
programme.desc: Rich restaurant owner Özgür prefers casual encounters to serious relationships. Ezgi wants to get married, but ends up being used by men. Özgür agrees to give him dating tips so that his next relationship with Serdar will work out.

programme.title: Room 309 (VO)

programme.title: The Legacy of the Enchanted Veil
programme.desc: Tracy is the last of the three friends to keep her old wedding veil. Will he also have a magical effect on her, despite her skepticism?

programme.title: The Good Doctor

programme.title: Family Friends
programme.desc: A childhood friend of a wedding planner decides to hire her to organize his wedding and the two become increasingly closer while the bride-to-be is focused on work.

programme.title: ABC of Seduction
programme.desc: Abby is young, beautiful and a television producer, but her love life is a disaster and everyone knows it. When Mike Chadway is hired to spice up Abby's show, the seeds are sown for a war of the sexes the likes of which haven't been seen in a long time...

programme.desc: Nancy, a 34-year-old woman, tired of the countless dates her friends arrange for her, stumbles upon a 40-year-old divorcee - Jack. He mistakes her for her 24-year-old blind date and Nancy decides to pretend and continue with that story.

programme.title: Sandokan: The Pirate Prince
programme.desc: As Brooke tries to redeem herself in the consul's eyes, a new realization leads Sandokan and Marianne to a Dayak village hidden in the Sarawak jungle.

programme.title: Room 309 (VO)
programme.desc: Onur and Lale go on a blind date arranged by their mothers and wake up the next morning in the same bed.

programme.title: How to Kill Your Husband
programme.desc: Nancy Crampton-Brophy, known for writing about homicides and tumultuous relationships, fantasies about killing or running away from her husband and even faking her own death, was arrested in 2022 for murdering her husband.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: A patient with a mysterious undiagnosed illness that has stumped doctors for years forces Dr. Shaun Murphy and the team to take big risks. Meanwhile, Dr. Claire Brown and Dr. Neil Melendez continue to try to understand how they feel about each other as colleagues and friends.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: As Shaun continues to grieve the loss of Lea, Morgan faces a difficult career decision. A patient's wishes spark disagreements between Andrews and Lim.

programme.title: Eternal love (VO)
programme.desc: Kemal and Asu are ready for the ceremony. Asu fulfills the promise he made to Emir and Ozan finds himself in an unexpected situation again.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: After the scandal, Yildiz and Zehra face the consequences, while Ender steps up his game against Sahika by inviting Nadir. Between jealousy, suspicions and new alliances, the conflict becomes even more dangerous.

programme.title: dreamy bird
programme.desc: Sanem dreams of living in the Galapagos Islands and being a writer, but her mother wants her to find a job. When she gets it at an advertising agency, the young woman kisses Can at the company's birthday party.

programme.title: An Opportunity to Love
programme.desc: A meteorology professor must decide between her new job as a popular weather presenter and her ambition to earn a PhD and a research grant.

programme.title: Sweet Revenge: The Mystery of Hannah Swensen
programme.desc: As Hannah and Mike navigate their engagement and balance their demanding careers, a murder at a 24-hour gym complicates their wedding plans.

programme.title: Hilo mortal
programme.desc: A new explosive, whose color and taste are like water, threatens American politicians. The problem lies in the impossibility of analyzing the remains of the explosive material.

programme.title: elite mercenaries
programme.desc: Billionaire technology CEO Donovan Chalmers hires a group of deadly mercenaries to protect a piece of technology that, if exposed, could destroy the world. Their mission becomes even more risky when Chalmers' daughter is kidnapped by the dangerous terrorist group 'The Pardoners', who will stop at nothing to obtain the valuable and dangerous technology.

programme.title: The source of life
programme.desc: An odyssey about a man's fight to save the woman he loves in three time spaces: the 21st century, the conquest of America, and the future.

programme.title: The flight
programme.desc: Commander Whip Whitaker is forced to make an emergency landing of the aircraft he is piloting, thereby saving many lives. He is considered a hero, until the subsequent investigation reveals that he had used narcotics the night before the incident. The pilot faces a trial in which he must put his career and his own life in order.

programme.title: survive tonight
programme.desc: The home of a disgraced doctor is invaded by two criminals. One of them was shot during a robbery. Although the doctor tries to help him, his knowledge is insufficient to stop the bleeding. His only concern is to protect his family at all costs.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: Upon returning from a mission in Mombasa, elite soldier Ray Garrison and his wife are kidnapped and murdered. Shortly after, Ray awakens in the Spirit Reborn Project facility with no memory of his past.

programme.title: chain of favors
programme.desc: A child decides to carry out an experiment for his social sciences class with the intention of improving the world under a simple premise: he will do a series of favors for three people and in exchange he will ask them to "return" the favor by doing something for three other people, of whom they will ask the same. His idea becomes a national phenomenon, which also has profound consequences on his family.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: Peter Parker and Mary Jane are finally together. They have both been able to accept their feelings and start a relationship. Mary Jane has landed a great role on Broadway and Peter continues to put on the Spiderman suit, helping those in need and capturing the city's criminals. Life seems to smile at them, even though their friend Harry continues to blame Peter for his father's death. But this is not the only threat that looms over the protagonists. An alien entity with symbiotic and violent behavior has arrived on Earth. Peter comes into contact with it, but even though his powers seem to increase when it envelops him, Peter realizes the dangers it poses and gets rid of it. The alien possesses Eddie Brocks, giving rise to a new and feared villain called Venom. At the same time, another villain begins to operate in the city, Sandman. Finally, Venom and Sandman kidnap Mary Jane and Spiderman must save her with the help of an unexpected ally. Director Sam Raimi was against the appearance of the Venom character in his film due to the character's lack of humanity. But producer Avi Arad convinced him that he had a large group of followers who read his stories in the Spider-Man comics and that he should appear. Topher Grace's performance definitely convinced him of Venom's appearance in this third installment of the saga. It took three years to make the special effects related to Sandman's powers, many experiments were carried out to analyze the behavior of the sand and digitally imitate it on the big screen.

programme.title: Escape from Alcatraz
programme.desc: Frank Morris, a prisoner specialized in escapes with a very high intelligence quotient, is imprisoned in Alcatraz prison. In his head he keeps preparing an escape plan that will not be risk-free.

programme.title: A winter on the beach
programme.desc: A writer lives with an obsession: his ex-wife, who eloped with another man years ago. Her problems cause her a literary block while her neighbor tries to get her to see life in a different way. The daughter and son of the protagonist also try to open a literary career.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: Becky Fuller, an energetic TV producer, is fired from her job, her professional life becomes as bleak as her love life. To move forward with his career, he must face a new challenge: launching a morning magazine show on a New York channel.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: Peter Parker was abandoned by his parents when he was still a child, and was raised by his Uncle Ben and Aunt May. Somewhat marginalized at school, Peter wants to know his past and find out who he is, but there he meets his first love, Gwen Stacy. When Peter discovers a briefcase that belonged to his father, he begins a quest to learn how his parents disappeared, something that will take him to Oscorp and the laboratory of his father's former partner, Dr. Connor, where he is bitten by an experimentally modified spider that gives him incredible powers. The murder of his uncle by a thief will make him seek revenge, catching the criminals he finds in his path, so he realizes that his destiny is to help people. But Dr. Connor, in turn, is forced to test his own experiment (a lizard serum that regenerates body limbs) on himself after his dismissal, which turns him into The Lizard. This will spread panic among the citizens, and Peter will be forced to use his powers. It is the first film of a cinematographic reboot of this character, since due to script problems Sony had canceled the fourth installment of Spider-Man, opting for this reboot. Marc Webb is in charge of directing the film, and he specializes in the world of music videos, in which groups such as Green Day, My Chemical Romance, Evanescence, Maroon 5 and Fergie have featured him. His only films are (500) Days Together and the first and second installment of this new Spider-Man saga. Andrew Garfield plays Peter Parker. He began in theater and acted in Leones por Corderos and the television film Boy A, which gave him recognition; just like his performance in The Social Network. Emma Stone plays Gwen Stacy, and participated in films such as Campus Bunny, Ghosts of My Ex-Girlfriends, Crazy, Stupid, Love or Entitled to Friction. His role in Easy A earned him a Golden Globe nomination.

programme.title: Diablo (A Man Apart)
programme.desc: Two DEA agents, Sean Vetter and his partner Demetrius Hicks, have been working for years on the border between Mexico and the United States trying to send the famous boss of the Baja California cartel, Momo Lucero, to prison. When they finally succeed, Vetter is ready to enjoy a well-deserved rest by returning home to his wife Stacy. But after Lucero's arrest, a mysterious man known as 'Diablo' enters the scene and proclaims himself the new leader of the cartel and once he takes control of operations, a mysterious figure causes the death of Vetter's wife. Destroyed and with nothing to lose, he is determined to seek revenge, so from that moment on he will dedicate all his efforts to ending Diablo, even if to do so he has to reach an agreement with Lucero or face his own companions.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: Natalie Cook, Dylan Sanders and Alex Munday are three special agents with overwhelming fighting and combat capabilities. But although each one is very different from the others, they will all be hired by a man named Charlie to carry out a special and very dangerous mission: find Eric Knox, a computer genius kidnapped because of his latest invention: an incredibly precise voice scanner. Through their investigations, Natalie, Dylan and Alex will discover clues that will lead them across the entire world, exuding charm and femininity to achieve their goals and destroying anyone who gets in their way. Drew Barrymore was a huge fan of the "Harry Potter" phenomenon, going so far as to read small parts of the different books to the members of the recording crew and the other actors. At the beginning of the film, when she is seen with glasses and black hair before being hired, she is also reading a Harry Potter book.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: The Edge
programme.desc: Second part of Charlie's Angels. Dylan, Natalie and Alex are sent by their boss on a new mission: locate a group of rings that have been stolen from the Department of Justice. This device allows its owner to know the list of people who are in the FBI's Witness Protection Program. When the first witnesses begin to appear dead, the Angels will have to use all their ingenuity to solve the case. An exceptional cameo can be seen in this film: one of the original Angels, Jaclyn Smith.

programme.title: Hulk
programme.desc: Bruce Banner is a renowned scientist, with a murky family past, who suffers with his team a serious laboratory accident in which everyone is exposed to intense gamma radiation. When he discovers that he is the only one who has survived, he is confused and begins to investigate. But Bruce has developed a terrible ability after the accident that could hinder the investigation; when he gets angry he turns into a giant green monster with irrational and destructive behavior. To create the Hulk character using digital technology, the company Light & Magic made the largest technical deployment in its history. It was necessary to work together with one hundred and eighty ILM technicians and work on the character for more than a year and a half. Even so, there are viewers who have compared the technical quality of the Hulk to that of Shrek. In this film, Hulk reaches the largest size he had reached to date, nine meters tall. Ang Lee used the split-screen technique to cinematically imitate the panels of a comic book page. To do this, he had to shoot the same scene several times, which somewhat exhausted actor Eric Bana, who plays Brece Banner. Much of the microbiology work seen on screen is real, done by Ang Lee's wife.

programme.title: Invictus
programme.desc: This film is an adaptation of the book "Playing the enemy" by John Carlin. In 1990 Nelson Mandela became President of his country, after having been released from prison. One of his most important measures was the abolition of apartheid. He intended to achieve reconciliation between the black and white populations. It was in 1995 when he used the Rugby World Cup in South Africa as an instrument to achieve national unity.

programme.title: Hilo mortal
programme.desc: A new explosive, whose color and taste are like water, threatens American politicians. The problem lies in the impossibility of analyzing the remains of the explosive material.

programme.title: The truth about Charlie
programme.desc: Regina is thinking about divorcing Charlie. When she returns to Paris after her vacation in Martinique, her husband has been murdered and her checking account and home have been looted. Three of Charlie's former friends pursue her to recover money that she knows nothing about and the police see her as the main suspect. Her situation is increasingly dangerous and confusing, as she also has to face her feelings for Joshua, whom she met in Martinique.

programme.title: The mask of Zorro
programme.desc: 1821. The Mexican army strives to liberate its country from the Spanish yoke. In the Californias area, the evil Spanish governor, Don Rafael Montero, is about to lose everything. In a last attempt to catch his nemesis, the masked swordsman "Zorro", Montoro prepares to murder three innocents. With the help of two orphans, Joaquín and Alejandro Murrieta, Zorro frees the prisoners. Then he will give both boys a special medallion and flee on his horse, Tornado, after marking Montero with a small "Z" on his neck as a warning. But that same night the soldiers enter the house of a nobleman named Don Diego de la Vega and arrest him since they are convinced that he is the real Zorro. Don Diego's wife dies, he is locked up in prison and his daughter, Elena, is taken to Spain as Montoro's daughter, where he will raise her as if she were his own. Twenty years later, Montoro secretly returns to California and looks for Diego in prison but cannot find him because he is unrecognizable due to age. However, the prisoner does remember the man and with a thirst for revenge like he had never had before, he escapes from prison and decides to put an end to his enemy forever. Along the way he will discover Elena, his daughter, who is as beautiful as her mother when she was murdered. Tired, old and completely destroyed by the years of captivity, Don Diego de la Vega will decide to train an adult Alejandro Muerrieta, now a bandit and rogue, to become the new Zorro and avenge all the suffering that the evil Rafael Montero caused him. At first Anthony Hopkins rejected the role of Don Diego de la Vega because he had unbearable pain in his back. When a laser operation managed to alleviate the problem, he then offered to accept playing the wise old "Zorro."

programme.title: The legend of Zorro
programme.desc: 1850. California has been tortured by the colonizers for years but will finally become the thirty-first state of the Union. Zorro suspects that a group of individuals intend to sabotage this decision for their own benefit, so he will stop them in a heroic feat. At the same time, McGivens, a French baron, is dedicated to blackmailing the inhabitants of California to keep their lands and leaving those who earned their living from the countryside in absolute poverty. Don Alejandro de la Vega, the one nicknamed "Zorro" with his mask, his sword, his horse and his cape, has finally been able to marry the beautiful Elena and has a ten-year-old son named Joaquín. The little boy misses his father, whom he hardly sees, and on the other hand idealizes the figure of his hero, Zorro, without knowing what his true identity is. Alejandro promises to leave the mask behind forever and dedicate himself to his family, but when a new crisis appears in California, he acts once again to solve it. Elena, feeling cheated, kicks her husband out of the house and presents him with divorce papers. At that moment, an old companion of the woman arrives at the scene: the French aristocrat Army. When he finds out about Elena's separation, he immediately begins to court her while attending to his affairs in the secret brotherhood in which he is involved. Now Alejandro will have to choose between alleviating the suffering of the oppressed or returning to his family. But to do so he must defeat the always shady Baron Army. For "The Legend of Zorro" both Steven Spielberg and Robert Rodriguez planned to direct the film, but in the end they did not take the job, although Spielberg did stay on as executive producer.

programme.title: Diablo (A Man Apart)
programme.desc: Two DEA agents, Sean Vetter and his partner Demetrius Hicks, have been working for years on the border between Mexico and the United States trying to send the famous boss of the Baja California cartel, Momo Lucero, to prison. When they finally succeed, Vetter is ready to enjoy a well-deserved rest by returning home to his wife Stacy. But after Lucero's arrest, a mysterious man known as 'Diablo' enters the scene and proclaims himself the new leader of the cartel and once he takes control of operations, a mysterious figure causes the death of Vetter's wife. Destroyed and with nothing to lose, he is determined to seek revenge, so from that moment on he will dedicate all his efforts to ending Diablo, even if to do so he has to reach an agreement with Lucero or face his own companions.

programme.title: Time to kill
programme.desc: In a quiet southern town in Mississippi, two drunk young men savagely rape a 10-year-old black girl. The white majority of the city is horrified by such a heinous crime, until Carl Lee, Tonya's father, armed with an assault rifle, decides to take justice into his own hands and kills his daughter's rapists. For ten days, as tension grows and the burning crosses of the Ku Klux Klan reappear on the streets of Clanton, Jake Brigance, a young white lawyer, will do everything possible to save Carl Lee's life while trying not to lose his own.

programme.title: Deuda de sangre
programme.desc: When Terry McCaleb is called to a crime scene where his partners Detective Waller and Arrango are waiting for him, he can't imagine how events will unfold. Victims five and six of the latest series of murders await him, and on a wall is written in blood "McCaleb, fuck me if you can" and a number code. As Terry tries to avoid giving answers to the reporters, he encounters one with blood on his shoes. He will chase him but when he almost catches him, he suffers a heart attack and falls to the ground. The suspect approaches and looks at him and Terry shoots him in the fog he sees without knowing if he has really wounded him. 2 years later, Terry is going to have some tests after his heart transplant. His doctor, Dr. Fox, gives him the all-clear before the retired agent goes to his ship, where he meets Graciella Rivers. The woman wants to hire him to investigate the disappearance of her nephew: Raymond. He also tells him that the heart that Terry has received is from Graciella's own sister. The next day the retired agent will meet with his former colleagues, who show him a security tape of a small store where there has been a murder. Even though it is prohibited, Terry will go there to ask questions to begin his investigation until he comes to the conclusion that the store robbery and murder has to do with another that occurred recently. As the investigation continues, Terry's stress increases, causing his recent transplant to hurt more and more. But the murders are there and the former agent is convinced that he will be able to find a relationship between all of them that will bring to light the culprit. This Clint Eastwood film exists in the same universe as "The Innocent." But despite his most famous roles playing Dirty Harry and other cops, this FBI agent is the last of Clint's incarnations as a detective.

programme.title: Mutiny on board
programme.desc: In 1787, the ship Bounty made a dangerous journey of 50,000 kilometers. After a month of sailing under strong storms, Captain William Bligh allows the crew to dock on a remote island so that they can rest. After seeing the situation of lack of control among the sailors, the captain insists on returning to the boat to continue his trip. However, the second in command, Fletcher Christian, will support his men.

programme.title: The silence of the lambs
programme.desc: Promising FBI agent Clarice Starling is pulled from her special forces training by Jack Crawford of the FBI's Behavioral Study Unit. He wants me to study a notorious eccentric psychopath named Habbibal Lecter, who was a forensic psychiatrist imprisoned for multiple murders and cannibalism. The purpose of the meetings between Clarice and Hannibal must be for the latter to agree to help her catch a serial killer named Buffalo Bill. But what the woman did not imagine was that Hannibal would turn out to be a sophisticated and cultured man restricted from others by glass walls. Although he is polite at first, he soon begins to lose patience when Clarice tries to create a psychological profile for him. While the hunts continue throughout Chicago and Buffalo Bill collects his kills without the FBI being able to do anything to solve it, Clarice will have to find a way to ingratiate herself with a man who ate the people around him and show him that, in addition to being intelligent, she is not afraid of him at all. Things will start to get difficult when the Senator's daughter disappears and everything indicates that Buffalo Bill has her and that soon her body will appear as a new victim. The events of this film take place after what happened in the film Hunter (1986). Although there are many characters in common in the two films, only two of the actors share films. Frankie Faison plays Lt. Fisk in Hunter and Barney in The Silence of the Lambs; On the other hand, Dan Butler plays the fingerprint expert FBI agent in Hunter and an entomologist in "The Silence of the Lambs."

programme.title: natural born killers
programme.desc: Mickey and Mallory are two young people who, in love and maddened, murder the girl's father in cold blood and begin a flight. The host of a sensationalist program decides to take advantage of the fascination that his personality exerts on the public to turn the murderers into television heroes.

programme.title: A doctor in the countryside
programme.desc: After 30 years working as the only doctor in a small village in a rural area of ​​southern France, Jean-Pierre falls ill. Health problems remove the doctor who treated, cured and cared for his neighbors from the profession 365 days a year and at any time. That is why it is necessary for another person to move in to replace him during sick leave. At that moment, Nathalie, a young doctor who has just finished her residency and who also has extensive experience as a nurse, arrives in the village. She will be in charge of helping Pierre with his work when he can't, but it will be a professional challenge because she has never worked in a medical office in a small town. In this way, it will also be complicated for Jean-Pierre because for him his work is the most important thing, so he will have to learn to deal with his new partner.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: Natalie Cook, Dylan Sanders and Alex Munday are three special agents with overwhelming fighting and combat capabilities. But although each one is very different from the others, they will all be hired by a man named Charlie to carry out a special and very dangerous mission: find Eric Knox, a computer genius kidnapped because of his latest invention: an incredibly precise voice scanner. Through their investigations, Natalie, Dylan and Alex will discover clues that will lead them across the entire world, exuding charm and femininity to achieve their goals and destroying anyone who gets in their way. Drew Barrymore was a huge fan of the "Harry Potter" phenomenon, going so far as to read small parts of the different books to the members of the recording crew and the other actors. At the beginning of the film, when she is seen with glasses and black hair before being hired, she is also reading a Harry Potter book.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: The Edge
programme.desc: Second part of Charlie's Angels. Dylan, Natalie and Alex are sent by their boss on a new mission: locate a group of rings that have been stolen from the Department of Justice. This device allows its owner to know the list of people who are in the FBI's Witness Protection Program. When the first witnesses begin to appear dead, the Angels will have to use all their ingenuity to solve the case. An exceptional cameo can be seen in this film: one of the original Angels, Jaclyn Smith.

programme.title: Hulk
programme.desc: Bruce Banner is a renowned scientist, with a murky family past, who suffers with his team a serious laboratory accident in which everyone is exposed to intense gamma radiation. When he discovers that he is the only one who has survived, he is confused and begins to investigate. But Bruce has developed a terrible ability after the accident that could hinder the investigation; when he gets angry he turns into a giant green monster with irrational and destructive behavior. To create the Hulk character using digital technology, the company Light & Magic made the largest technical deployment in its history. It was necessary to work together with one hundred and eighty ILM technicians and work on the character for more than a year and a half. Even so, there are viewers who have compared the technical quality of the Hulk to that of Shrek. In this film, Hulk reaches the largest size he had reached to date, nine meters tall. Ang Lee used the split-screen technique to cinematically imitate the panels of a comic book page. To do this, he had to shoot the same scene several times, which somewhat exhausted actor Eric Bana, who plays Brece Banner. Much of the microbiology work seen on screen is real, done by Ang Lee's wife.

programme.title: Beauty and the beast
programme.desc: Adaptation of the story of Beauty and the Beast. When Bella's father is shipwrecked, she is exiled to the countryside. The land belongs to the kingdom of the Beast, from whom he steals a rose and is sentenced to death. Belle sacrifices herself for her father and goes to live in Beast's castle. There he will investigate the secrets that surround its owner and discover that he was a prince. True love will arise between them without expecting it.

programme.title: Shopping center superpoli
programme.desc: Paul Blart is a single father trying to make a living as a security officer at a shopping center. When a robbery closes the doors of the center, the security officer will have to become a real police officer.

programme.title: Superpoli in Las Vegas
programme.desc: Paul Blart is a security guard who must travel to Las Vegas to supervise a Security Guard Exhibition, and he takes the opportunity to take his daughter, Maya, before she goes to study abroad. What Paul did not expect is that some criminals commit a robbery in the middle of the exhibition, having to demonstrate what he has learned in his training.

programme.title: Men in Black: The men in black
programme.desc: The Men in Black are agents who work for the government on a secret mission that consists of monitoring aliens living on our planet without us knowing. James Edwards (Will Smith), a police officer, and Agent K (Tommy Lee Jones), one of the Men in Black, discover that an alien terrorist intends to destroy Earth. James and Agent K will try to destroy these aliens and prevent humanity from being destroyed. In this film, Barry Sonnenfeld adapts the story of the same name by Lowell Cunningham, which refers to these supposed men in charge of hiding the existence of extraterrestrial life in various conspiracy theories. Sonnenfeld is known for films such as "Wild Wild West" (1999) and "The Adams Family" (1991). He began working for the Coen brothers as a director of photography but soon began making his own films. Originally "Men in Black" was offered to director Quentin Tarantino, who declined to participate in the project, as did Clint Eastwood, who was offered the role of Agent K. The film has several sequels directed by Sonnenfeld. The first feature film in the saga received positive reviews, something that the second installment did not achieve despite all of them being a great success at the box office. The film has three Oscar nominations, from which it won a statuette, and was also nominated for the Golden Gobles. The music, composed by Danny Elfman, caused the film "Men in Black" to be included in the American Film Institute's "100 Years&100 songs" list.

programme.title: I continue like God
programme.desc: Popular Buffalo reporter Evan Baxter has just become a congressman, so he moves with his family to a luxurious development in Huntsville, Virginia. Everything seems to be going well for the Baxter family, who are focused on adjusting to their new luxury-filled life away from their hometown. Evan is expectant since in his first days as a congressman, the powerful Congressman Long proposes that he work together with his team in the development of a bill, which makes him think that God has heard his prayers and that professional success has finally knocked on his door. However, Evan's future begins to falter when one day a man who calls himself God appears at his house and entrusts him with an important mission of biblical proportions: build an ark to save a pair of each animal species and thus save humanity from the approaching universal flood. Even though Evan is skeptical and considers the man crazy, when pairs of all kinds of animals begin to arrive in his garden and different suppliers begin to knock on his door bringing enormous quantities of wood and other materials, Evan is forced to believe in God and forcibly accept the order. Resigned and with the help of his three children and the manual 'Build Arks for Dummies', Evan begins his important task. During the process, many will consider Evan crazy and begin to call him 'The Noah of New York' as he will undergo a significant transformation, both physically and mentally.

programme.title: Duplicity
programme.desc: MI6 agent Ray Koval (Clive Owen) is in Dubai when he meets Claire Stenwick (Julia Roberts). After groping her a little, he manages to win her over and they spend the night together, without knowing that Claire is part of the CIA. When Ray wakes up the next day, the woman has disappeared with several compromised documents. For years, Ray searches for her, leaves his job at MI6 and gets a new one in the espionage department of a large multinational. In his third week of work he meets Claire again. Now they both work as spies for large companies and Claire is not willing to allow anyone to come and destroy the professional future she has been building for just over a year. The two spies will use all kinds of tricks to keep their positions, but they will also have to fight against the great attraction they feel for each other so as not to succumb to the other person's deceptions. In this film, actor Clive Owen plays MI6 spy Ray Koval. Owen began his career in television, working mainly on not very well-known series. Currently, although he still makes some stellar appearances on television, he is one of the best-known faces on the big screen. He has worked in films such as 'The Bourne Affair', 'King Arthur' and 'Closer' where he shares the bill for the first time with actress Julia Roberts. In 'Duplicity', Roberts plays Claire Stenwick, a retired CIA agent. The acclaimed actress began her career in 1987, in the series 'The History of Crime'. After that she worked in several films until she became famous with 'Pretty Woman' and her starring role alongside actor Richard Gere. From there her career took off and her charming smile made her 'America's Sweetheart'. He played several leading roles in romantic comedies but he has always tried to combine it with more serious roles such as those he played in 'Stay by me' or 'Erin Brockovich'.

programme.title: World Questions
programme.desc: A special edition of World Questions, putting young Moroccan women at the centre of a national debate about rights, faith and family law reform. Jonny Dymond chairs a panel of feminist activists and conservatives as they debate issues such as child marriage, sex outside marriage, inheritance, harassment and polygamy. As a new generation pushes for change, Morocco stands out in the Muslim world, with reform being debated openly, and this programme hears from young women at a pivotal moment in civil society.

programme.title: Cinta Dalam Semangkok Bakwan Malang
programme.desc: Seorang gadis dan seorang lelaki bertemu dalam sebuah perjumpaan yang tidak menyenangkan di pasar, benarkah mereka takkan bertemu lagi? Atau akankah takdir berkata lain?

programme.title: Pacar Dari Langit
programme.desc: Karena ayahnya sakit. Mega terpaksa pulang ke kampung halaman dan jatuh cinta kepada alien bernama Zen. yang berjanji akan selalu menjaganya.

programme.title: Cinta Lutung Kasarung
programme.desc: Rara yang culas dan ambisius kecewa ketika Sari terpilih sebagai pewaris utama Prabu. Rara bersekongkol dengan Indra untuk menyingkirkan Sari dengan memberinya ramuan yang membuat kulitnya bersisik dan bersembunyi di hutan.

programme.title: Cincin Wali
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda dari kota melihat gadis yang pernah ditemuinya dalam mimpi. Dia memutuskan untuk tinggal di pesantren yang sama dengan gadis tersebut. Namun, untuk mendapatkan gadis itu dia harus memperoleh cincin wali.

programme.title: Prajurit Bantegan
programme.desc: Igo pindah dari kota besar setelah kedua orang tuanya meninggal. Saat mendapat masalah dengan pemilik sanggar bantengan, dia bertemu Ki Sungkur yang menolongnya. Sejak itu dia berguru silat kepada Ki Sungkur.

programme.title: Silat Boy The Series 5
programme.desc: Mada dan kawan-kawan sangat optimis akan memenangkan pertandingan ini dari Tim Malaysia, juara bertahan empat tahun berturut-turut. Saksikanlah pertandingan silat antara Tim Indonesia melawan Tim Malaysia!

programme.title: 7 Pusaka - Sabuk Penghilang Raga
programme.desc: Raga, maling kelas teri yang bernasib sial. Saat dikejar para warga dan bersembunyi di dalam sebuah kali, tiba-tiba Raga menemukan sebuah koin gobang yang hanyut. Saat Raga menggenggam koin itu, tiba-tiba saja ia menghilang.

programme.title: Cinta Dalam Semangkok Bakwan Malang
programme.desc: Seorang gadis dan seorang lelaki bertemu dalam sebuah perjumpaan yang tidak menyenangkan di pasar, benarkah mereka takkan bertemu lagi? Atau akankah takdir berkata lain?

programme.title: Cintaku Di Kejar Cicilan
programme.desc: Andre adalah pria tampan yang selalu bergaya dengan barang-barang mewah. Namun, semua itu dibeli Andre dengan berutang, akhirnya dia pun dikejar cicilan yang menumpuk.

programme.title: Sunan Gunung Jati - Nyi Rara Santang Masuk Islam
programme.desc: Saksikan kisah Nyi Rara Santang, sosok legendaris dari Jawa Barat.

programme.title: Mantan Pacarku Superhero
programme.desc: Seorang mahasiswa yang menyebalkan dan sok jagoan, tiba-tiba mendapatkan pacar yang ternyata benar-benar seorang pahlawan super. Namun sang pacar ternyata luar biasa posesif dan memakai kekuatan supernya untuk meneror mahasiswa.

programme.title: Kembalikan Tubuhku
programme.desc: Dinda dan Marsya mengalami sebuah kecelakaan. Kejadian ini membuat Marsya dan Dinda bertukar tubuh. Dinda masuk ke tubuh Marsya dan menggunakan tubuhnya. Namun justru permasalahan baru dimulai. Bagaimanakah kisah mereka?

programme.title: Toko Kr.Amat : Teko 1001 Malam
programme.desc: Rani, cewek cupu yang dirundung teman-temannya dan kerap mendapat perlakuan buruk. Ia mendapat perlakuan kasar dari tantenya. Rani menemukan sebuah teko, ketika digosok keluarlah sosok jin yang bisa mengabulkan tiga permintaan.

programme.title: Cinta Di Musim Duren
programme.desc: Ayas tertipu habis-habisan dan mengalami kesulitan keuangan. Untuk membayar hutang, dia menerima tawaran bekerja di kios durian. Vina yang pada awalnya membenci Ayas, merasa iba dan membantunya ikut casting.

programme.title: Murderer Pursues
programme.desc: Danny Lee berperan sebagai pria yang dikira sebagai pengungsi dan dibuntuti oleh seorang polisi jujur dalam film kejahatan menarik asal Tiongkok-Vietnam arahan aktor yang kini menjadi sutradara, Wang Chung.

programme.title: The Black Lizard
programme.desc: Pendekar pedang Lung Fei menemukan tanda-tanda aneh yang meramalkan kematian tunangannya. Dengan bantuan Kepala Polisi Tieh Hu, ia melakukan penyelidikan dan mengungkap sebuah kisah yang mencengangkan.

programme.title: The Bride From Hell
programme.desc: Idola tahun '70-an, Hsing Hui dan Yon Fan, membintangi film horor yang bercerita tentang pengusaha muda yang menikahi wanita muda nan cantik tanpa menyadari jika sang gadis dirasuki oleh iblis.

programme.title: The Singing Killer
programme.desc: Chiang Yi diperas untuk melakukan pencurian perhiasan oleh mantan bosnya yang mengancam akan mengungkap masa lalunya yang kelam. Masalah muncul saat ia mengetahui bahwa cinta pertamanya bekerja di toko itu.

programme.title: King Drummer
programme.desc: Ling Yun berperan sebagai pemain pengganti yang disewa oleh sebuah band populer setelah pemain drum mereka yang egois mengundurkan diri untuk bergabung dengan band saingan mereka.

programme.title: Young Lovers
programme.desc: Seorang anak dari keluarga kaya yang gemar bermain gitar bernama Yang Fan pergi ke Jepang untuk bergabung dengan sebuah band rock. Ia juga berusaha mendapatkan cinta dari dua gadis cantik.

programme.title: Dirty Ho
programme.desc: Wang adalah pangeran ke-11 yang menyamar sebagai ahli barang antik demi menyembunyikan identitas aslinya. Ia merasa menemukan pria yang tepat untuk membantunya saat bertemu seorang penipu cerdas bernama Dirty Ho.

programme.title: My Dream Boat
programme.desc: Sebuah film yang berkisah tentang sebuah hubungan cinta nan rumit antara sekelompok anak muda yang terjerat dalam ikatan cinta dan emosi.

programme.title: The Black Tavern
programme.desc: Sebuah penginapan menjadi tempat para penjahat bertemu guna merencanakan kejahatan mereka. Sekelompok penjahat tertarik ke tempat tersebut karena desas-desus tentang sebuah harta berharga yang disembunyikan di sana.

programme.title: Dead End
programme.desc: Saat Chang Sun memberikan tumpangan pada Wen Jou yang tengah tersesat, ia langsung jatuh cinta. Namun, Chang harus memperjuangkan cintanya karena kakak Wen, seorang gangster bernama Wen Chiang, tidak menyukainya.

programme.title: The Lady Professional
programme.desc: Lily Ho berperan sebagai wanita penggoda dalam film thriller kontemporer Shaw Brothers ini. Berlatar di Hong Kong dan Jepang, film ini bercerita tentang Ho yang menyadari jika dirinya menjadi target pembunuhan.

programme.title: The Deadly Breaking Sword
programme.desc: Prajurit Tuan Chang Qing bertemu wanita penghibur Liu Yin Xi di sebuah kota kecil. Liu meminta Tuan untuk membunuh Guo Tian Sheng, yang dikenal sebagai 'Dokter Pembunuh', untuk membalas kematian tunangannya.

programme.title: Iron Bodyguard
programme.desc: Wang Wu, seorang kepala perusahaan keamanan Iron Bodyguard, bertemu dengan seorang murid yang merupakan anggota Reformis, kelompok sarjana yang mendesak reformasi sosial di Tiongkok pada akhir dinasti Qing.

programme.title: The Pure And The Evil
programme.desc: Reuni dua teman SMA yang semula manis segera berubah menjadi mimpi buruk erotis yang mengerikan ketika Rose tertarik pada mantan teman sekelasnya, Fang, dan tunangan barunya!

programme.title: The Pure And The Evil
programme.desc: Reuni dua teman SMA yang semula manis segera berubah menjadi mimpi buruk erotis yang mengerikan ketika Rose tertarik pada mantan teman sekelasnya, Fang, dan tunangan barunya!

programme.title: Pursuit Of A Killer
programme.desc: Demi mewarisi kekayaannya, Fei menyewa seorang pembunuh untuk membunuh sang ayah yang ia benci. Namun, saat mengetahui bahwa saudara perempuannya adalah sang pewaris, Fei juga ingin membunuhnya.

programme.title: Sons Of Good Earth
programme.desc: Film peraih penghargaan untuk naskah dan penyuntingan terbaik ini menceritakan kisah lain dari Perang Tiongkok-Jepang yang menggambarkan dengan jelas kehidupan masa perang secara artistik dan emosional.

programme.title: Swordsman At Large
programme.desc: Para bandit, gadis cantik dan ahli pedang bertarung untuk bertahan hidup dalam kisah menarik tentang penipuan, pengkhianatan dan kematian ini.

programme.title: Forever And Ever
programme.desc: Lo Wei mengarahkan film romantis yang menampilkan bakat akting Ivy Ling Po nan luar biasa. Film ini bercerita tentang seorang sarjana muda yang diperdaya untuk menikahi seorang putri bangsawan.

programme.title: The Fighting Fool
programme.desc: Meng Yuan-wen akan berhadapan dengan Kuan Feng dalam film saga Wushu yang penuh kehebohan tentang sebuah galah berharga yang memiliki rahasia besar.

programme.title: Blue Skies
programme.desc: Cheng Pei-pei berperan sebagai seorang penyanyi muda bernama Hsiao-Yun yang bimbang antara kesuksesannya dalam karier dan hubungannya dengan sang kekasih, seorang pianis bernama Li Yen-nan.

programme.title: The Casino
programme.desc: Setelah terpisah selama beberapa tahun, pasangan kekasih Lily Ho dan Yueh Hua bertemu di sebuah kasino dan mereka bersumpah untuk menghancurkan para jenderal militer korup, penjahat dan pemeras!

programme.title: The Killer Has No Return
programme.desc: Pembunuh profesional Lui pergi ke Malaysia setelah melaksanakan misinya membunuh seorang bos geng besar Hong Kong. Target selanjutnya adalah pengantin pria yang mengadakan pesta pernikahan di sebuah hotel di Pecinan.

programme.title: The Dream Of The Red Chamber
programme.desc: Film yang diadaptasi dari novel Dinasti Ching nan populer, kisah cinta yang menyentuh ini terbukti menjadi tantangan bagi banyak sineas film. Kombinasi klasik dari sastra abad ke-18 dan pembuatan film tahun 1960-an.

programme.title: Buddha's Palm
programme.desc: Tersebar kabar jika Ku yang buta menyimpan rahasia Telapak Tangan Buddha. Ia pun diserbu dari berbagai pihak seperti burung-burung raksasa nan mengerikan dan kelompok-kelompok pendekar bela diri.

programme.title: The Love Eterne
programme.desc: Dalam drama peraih berbagai penghargaan arahan Li Han Hsiang ini, Betty Loh Ti berperan sebagai gadis cantik yang menyamar sebagai anak lelaki demi mendapatkan pendidikan yang terlarang bagi anak perempuan.

programme.title: Heroes Of Sung
programme.desc: Dalam film kung fu klasik ini, Shih Zu, salah satu pahlawan wanita di perfilman laga Hong Kong, bekerjasama dengan Lo Lieh untuk menemukan dan melindungi segel kerajaan Dinasti Sung.

programme.title: The Tigress Of Shaolin
programme.desc: Sam diburu saat mengetahui bahwa walikota dan kepala biro medis bersekongkol dengan seorang pengedar narkoba. Ia melarikan diri ke Shaolin untuk mempelajari kung fu demi membalaskan dendam teman-temannya.

programme.title: The Tigress Of Shaolin
programme.desc: Sam diburu saat mengetahui bahwa walikota dan kepala biro medis bersekongkol dengan seorang pengedar narkoba. Ia melarikan diri ke Shaolin untuk mempelajari kung fu demi membalaskan dendam teman-temannya.

programme.title: Sweet And Wild
programme.desc: Hsiao Fang adalah seorang gadis yang tidak takut untuk melawan para preman. Sayangnya, ia mengira Ma Ta-hai yang tampan sebagai salah satu preman itu. Keduanya saling tertarik, namun mereka menolak untuk mengakuinya.

programme.title: The Jade Faced Assassin
programme.desc: Melodrama laga yang bercerita tentang pejuang wanita yang membesarkan putra musuhnya. Sementara itu, saudara kembar sang putra dibesarkan oleh musuh sang pejuang agar pada akhirnya kakak beradik itu akan saling membunuh.

programme.title: The Magnificent Concubine
programme.desc: Kaisar tergila-gila pada Yang Gui Fei, selir kesayangannya, sehingga ia menyerahkan pemerintahan negara kepada Perdana Menteri. Namun, Perdana Menteri yang korup, membuat rakyat memberontak.

programme.title: The Eunuch
programme.desc: Sebelum menyutradari Bruce Lee dalam film Fist Of Fury, Lo Wei telah menulis dan membintangi film yang mengisahkan seorang pengkhianat yang rela membunuh Kaisar demi merebut kekuasaan tertinggi ini.

programme.title: Tiger Killer
programme.desc: Setelah membunuh seekor harimau, Wu Sung mendapat kenaikan jabatan, namun ia malah terjebak dalam cinta segitiga yang tragis antara saudaranya yang buruk rupa dan istri saudaranya yang mencoba untuk menggodanya.

programme.title: Na Cha And The Seven Devils
programme.desc: Saat mencuri satu buah persik ajaib dari sebuah pohon mistik di Surga, Na Cha kecil secara tidak sengaja menjatuhkan tujuh buah persik lainnya ke Bumi, yang mengubah tujuh hewan berbeda menjadi tujuh iblis.

programme.title: Rear Entrance
programme.desc: Nyonya Xu melihat seorang gadis kecil bermain sendirian di pintu masuk dari jauh setiap hari. Ia dengan hangat mengasuh gadis itu, lalu mengadopsinya dari orang tuanya yang tak memedulikannya.

programme.title: Oath Of Death
programme.desc: Tiga pendukung setia Sung bekerja sama untuk melawan para penjajah Tartar. Ma melepaskan putri dari penjajah Tartar yang diculik dalam sebuah upaya strategis untuk melawan para penjajah.

programme.title: Sunset
programme.desc: Saat mobil yang ditumpangi sejumlah gadis berpapasan dengan mobil yang ditumpangi beberapa pria, Ching Li dan Paul Chin Pei jatuh cinta. Namun, kisah cinta mereka tidak berjalan mulus.

programme.title: The Singing Thief
programme.desc: Sutradara seni bela diri legendaris Chang Cheh mencoba peruntungannya dalam film musikal bersama penyanyi wanita asal Taiwan, Lin Chong, yang berperan sebagai pencuri permata yang berubah haluan menjadi penyanyi klub.

programme.title: The Younger Generation
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah tragis tentang seorang gadis yang menikah dan memiliki 5 anak. Setelah ia dan sang suami meninggal, salah seorang anaknya terpaksa menjadi PSK untuk menafkahi keempat saudaranya.

programme.title: Dragon Swamp
programme.desc: Ksatria Pengembara menghadapi Guru Naga Rawa dalam perseteruan keluarga yang telah berlangsung selama 20 tahun. Dalam film aksi nan epik dan emosional ini, semua orang memperebutkan Pedang Naga Giok.

programme.title: 7-Man Army
programme.desc: Pada tahun 1933, 20.000 tentara dan 50 tank Jepang menyerbu Tembok Besar Tiongkok.

programme.title: The Millionaire Chase
programme.desc: Peter Chen Ho adalah seorang playboy tampan yang mengencani tiga gadis kakak beradik, dan hal ini memicu serangkaian peristiwa konyol dan menghebohkan.

programme.title: Wusong Vs Ximenqing
programme.desc: Wu Song mengetahui perselingkuhan adik iparnya dengan pria kaya bernama Ximen Qing. Song pun dijebak dan diasingkan selama setahun oleh Qing, sementara sang adik dibunuh. Bisakah ia membalas kematian saudaranya?

programme.title: Mr. Virgin
programme.desc: Ketika seorang pemuda mengabaikan peringatan seorang ahli feng shui dan memutuskan untuk menikah sebelum berusia 30 tahun, serangkaian kesialan mulai mengutuk hidupnya.

programme.title: The Fate Of Reunion
programme.desc: Siluman Ular Hijau memperoleh pencerahan di bawah bimbingan Dao Qing dan perlahan jatuh cinta padanya. Namun, pengabdiannya pada Dao Qing membuatnya bereinkarnasi dan mengalami rasa sakit akibat kematian.

programme.title: The Magnificent Scoundrels
programme.desc: Valentino adalah penipu ulung yang bertemu dengan Kwan, sesama penipu. Bersama-sama, mereka menyamar sebagai berbagai orang dan menciptakan berbagai skema untuk menghasilkan uang. Sementara itu, para gangster sedang menyusun skema mereka sendiri.

programme.title: Unbeatable
programme.desc: Fai, yang pernah menjadi juara dunia tinju, melarikan diri ke Makau dari rentenir dan secara tak terduga bertemu Qi, seorang pemuda yang bertekad memenangkan pertandingan tinju.

programme.title: Hidden Heroine
programme.desc: Sebuah kartel narkoba menduduki wilayah Dong Zhou. Mei Jing dari Unit Komando Wanita Thunderbolt memimpin timnya untuk menyerang markas mereka. Namun, Mei dan timnya disergap dan identitas ayah Mei terungkap.

programme.title: Faithfully Yours
programme.desc: Sahabat baik Bodil dan Isabel, yang tampaknya telah menikah dengan bahagia, menyelinap pergi untuk melakukan perselingkuhan rahasia dengan menggunakan satu sama lain sebagai alibi. Namun, ketika Isabel terbunuh saat mereka seharusnya bersama. Bodil terjebak dalam jaringan kebohongannya sendiri.

programme.title: The Last Tycoon
programme.desc: Bintang laga Chow Yun-Fat memerankan gangster sungguhan Chen Daqi saat ia naik ke eselon atas kekuasaan, mendapati dirinya terpecah antara cinta dua wanita, rencana pembunuhan dinas rahasia, dan ancaman perang yang membayangi.

programme.title: How To Choose A Royal Bride
programme.desc: Kaisar muda Kangxi sedang berusaha memilih seorang istri. Ibunya telah mengatur agar beberapa wanita muda yang tersedia mengunjunginya sehingga ia dapat memilih.

programme.title: The Story Of My Son
programme.desc: Li Tsu-liang is newly widowed and leading an impoverished life with two young sons. He attempts to make a fortune at the horse-racing track, but is subsequently entangled with the loan sharks.

programme.title: Oily Maniac
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda frustrasi yang menderita polio bekerja sebagai asisten hukum untuk seorang pengacara korup. Ia menerima teknik untuk mendapatkan kekuatan aneh dari seorang pria yang sekarat, yang mengubahnya menjadi pahlawan super/penjahat berbasis minyak.

programme.title: Prince Charming
programme.desc: Chen Li Pin, putra dari pengusaha yang culun, mendapat kekecewaan usai mencari jodoh di Hawaii bersama temannya. Kemudian, secara tak sengaja mereka terjebak dalam sebuah pertukaran identitas yang kacau.

programme.title: VR Fighter
programme.desc: Long Wei mengalami gangguan pascatrauma usai kematian istrinya. Suatu hari, ia bertemu Amy yang bekerja di perusahaan teknologi VR dan diundang untuk menguji produk baru. Ia pun menjadi petarung VR perusahaan itu.

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Saat seorang pria meninggalkan istri dan putrinya, serangkaian percakapan singkat, gerakan yang diamati, pertemuan tak sengaja, dan tindakan impulsif, menceritakan kisah hubungan yang gagal dan berkembang setelah keputusan ini.

programme.title: The Mighty Peking Man
programme.desc: Seorang pengusaha serakah dari Hong Kong menyewa seorang pemburu muda untuk menangkap gorila raksasa yang konon hidup jauh di dalam hutan India. Pemburu itu menemukan kera tersebut, dan hidup bersamanya ia menemukan seorang wanita liar yang telah berteman dengan makhluk itu.

programme.title: The Mighty Peking Man
programme.desc: Seorang pengusaha serakah dari Hong Kong menyewa seorang pemburu muda untuk menangkap gorila raksasa yang konon hidup jauh di dalam hutan India. Pemburu itu menemukan kera tersebut, dan hidup bersamanya ia menemukan seorang wanita liar yang telah berteman dengan makhluk itu.

programme.title: Ip Man 2
programme.desc: Berfokus pada migrasi Ip Man ke Hong Kong pada tahun 1949 saat ia berupaya menyebarkan disiplin ilmu bela diri Wing Chun yang dianutnya.

programme.title: The Grandmaster
programme.desc: Ip Man menerima sebuah tantangan bertarung dari master asal utara yang sudah tua bernama Gong Yu Tian dan berhasil memenangkannya. Namun, ia dikalahkan oleh putri sang master, Gong Er, dan jatuh cinta padanya.

programme.title: Chinese Odyssey: Cinderella
programme.desc: Kelanjutan yang berbelit-belit dari petualangan Raja Kera yang kini menjadi manusia dan melakukan perjalanan waktu, yang berupaya memenuhi takdir ilahinya.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: Serangkaian kejadian aneh terjadi di sebuah desa, di antaranya sesosok mayat yang bangkit dari kuburnya dan melarikan diri. Saat diselidiki penduduk desa, seorang penjahat meninggal dan sang kepala desa menghilang.

programme.title: Destiny's Champion
programme.desc: Sun Chung dan Ti Lung bersatu kembali untuk sebuah kisah menegangkan tentang seorang pendekar tua yang berusaha menebus kesalahannya di masa lalu melalui seorang anak jalanan yang bijaksana.

programme.title: From Beijing With Love
programme.desc: Seorang mata-mata Tiongkok yang telah pensiun selama sepuluh tahun dan mencari nafkah sebagai tukang daging dikirim ke Hong Kong untuk menemukan tengkorak Tyrannosaurus rex yang dicuri.

programme.title: Iceman: The Time Traveler
programme.desc: Pengawal kekaisaran dan ketiga teman masa kecilnya yang berkhianat, yang diperintahkan untuk memburunya, secara tidak sengaja terkubur dan membeku dalam waktu. 400 tahun kemudian berlalu dan mereka dicairkan, melanjutkan pertempuran yang mereka tinggalkan.

programme.title: Kung Fu Stuntmen
programme.desc: Dokumenter ini menyoroti para master Kung Fu Tiongkok yang terkenal di industri film, memamerkan warisan Kung Fu Hong Kong selama enam puluh tahun dan mengabadikan kehidupan mereka yang penuh tantangan.

programme.title: Maoshan Heavenly Master
programme.desc: Tn. Zhang diusir dari klannya setelah tahanan Chi melarikan diri di bawah pengawasannya. Lalu, Tn. Zhang datang ke sebuah lokasi tempat hilangnya sejumlah orang dan menemukan bahwa Chi lah yang menangkap mereka.

programme.title: She Is In Danger
programme.desc: Xue menemukan bahwa Yi dan temannya telah membunuh mantan kekasih Yi, dan ia dikurung oleh keduanya untuk menutupi pembunuhan tersebut. Lalu, teman Xue, Wen, datang mencarinya. Bisakah mereka lolos dari bahaya?

programme.title: Dragon Master: Dragon Spell
programme.desc: Raja Naga dikunci dalam segel oleh Tuan Naga selama 500 tahun, dan putri sang Raja harus kembali ke masa lalu guna membunuh Tuan Naga saat mengetahui bahwa keduanya adalah teman dekat di masa lalu.

programme.title: Green Wood Robbery
programme.desc: Berlatar belakang tahun-tahun awal Republik Tiongkok, keluarga Kang yang kaya dibunuh secara brutal, dan putri kecil mereka satu-satunya saksi menghilang secara misterius.

programme.title: Operation Bangkok
programme.desc: Seorang veteran militer, Wu Wei, dan seorang polisi yang tengah menyamar, Tian Ming, memimpin sebuah tim untuk menyelamatkan para sandera yang ditangkap oleh sekelompok penjahat di sebuah pulau di luar Bangkok.

programme.title: Operation Bangkok
programme.desc: Seorang veteran militer, Wu Wei, dan seorang polisi yang tengah menyamar, Tian Ming, memimpin sebuah tim untuk menyelamatkan para sandera yang ditangkap oleh sekelompok penjahat di sebuah pulau di luar Bangkok.

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: Film ini berkisah tentang seorang pemadam kebakaran yang rela menerjang bahaya dan mempertaruhkan nyawanya demi menyelamatkan orang lain. Akan tetapi, apakah ia memiliki keberanian untuk menghadapi masalah pribadinya?

programme.title: Iceman
programme.desc: Seorang pengawal kekaisaran dan tiga teman masa kecilnya yang pengkhianat, yang diperintahkan untuk memburunya, secara tidak sengaja terkubur dan membeku dalam waktu. 400 tahun kemudian berlalu dan mereka dicairkan, melanjutkan pertempuran yang mereka tinggalkan.

programme.title: Mr. Possessed
programme.desc: Riley diberi kemampuan untuk menahan godaan dari lawan jenis namun hal itu menjadi beban ketika ia hendak menikahi kekasihnya.

programme.title: God Of Gamblers 2

programme.title: Unmatchable Match

programme.title: Sixty Million Dollar Man

programme.title: Seeding Of A Ghost

programme.title: The Mask Of Shura Of Fire Cloud

programme.title: Get In The Dark

programme.title: A Walk In The Woods
programme.desc: Bill Bryson pulang ke AS usai tinggal di Inggris selama 20 tahun dan memutuskan bahwa cara terbaik untuk mengenal tanah airnya adalah dengan mendaki Appalachian Trail bersama salah satu teman lamanya, Stephen Katz.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Camila Cabello
programme.desc: Selama berada di pedesaan Inggris, penyanyi keturunan Kuba-Amerika Camila Cabello menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. Sambil memetik gitar, Camila bercerita tentang proses penulisan lagunya dan antusiasmenya untuk memerankan versi terbaru Cinderella.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Dan Levy
programme.desc: Bekerja sama dengan Google Nest: Dan Levy, pencipta dan bintang serial TV populer Schitt's Creek, mengundang Vogue ke rumahnya yang diterangi cahaya hangat dan menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. Sambil didampingi sahabat setianya, Redmond, aktor yang pernah dinominasikan untuk Emmy ini berbincang tentang hubungannya dengan ayahnya, kecintaannya pada Jepang, serta betapa ia (dengan bangga) menikmati segelas cosmopolitan dengan es batu

programme.title: 24 Hours With Diplo
programme.desc: Diplo adalah sosok paling menarik yang sering terlewatkan di karpet merah. Dia punya lesung pipit! Dia punya celetukan-celetukan jenaka! Dan mungkin yang paling penting dari semuanya, dia punya gaya yang pas.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Robert Pattinson
programme.desc: Ikuti Robert Pattinson saat ia berkeliling Paris, mencium aroma parfum, dan duduk di barisan depan pada peragaan busana Dior.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Greta Gerwig
programme.desc: Aktris, pembuat film, dan sutradara film Barbie, Greta Gerwig, menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat sambil berjalan-jalan santai di Sony Pictures Studios. Dengan pemahaman mendalam tentang seperti apa kehidupan sebagai penulis skenario dan sutradara, Greta menjelaskan secara rinci segala hal yang terlibat dalam proses pembuatan filmnya dan menatap masa depannya di industri ini

programme.title: The Iceman

programme.desc: Ashley menceritakan bagaimana ia bertemu suaminya, produk apa yang benar-benar tak bisa ia tinggalkan, serta bagaimana ia bepergian ke dan dari Fashion Week tanpa repot berkat Lexus yang menyediakan layanan transportasi gratis bagi para desainer, model, editor, pengecer, dan profesional industri sebagai sponsor otomotif resmi New York Fashion Week.

programme.title: In The Name Of God
programme.desc: Serial dokumenter yang mengkaji kisah nyata mengerikan dari empat pemimpin Korea yang mengaku sebagai nabi ini mengungkap sisi gelap dari keyakinan yang tidak perlu dipertanyakan lagi.

programme.title: Paradise City

programme.title: 73 Questions With Cardi B
programme.desc: Bintang hip-hop ternama Cardi B mengajak Vogue mengunjungi apartemen neneknya di New York City dan menjawab 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi. Sambil menidurkan putrinya, Kulture, Cardi B berbincang tentang hubungannya dengan Offset, ketertarikannya pada politik, album terbarunya, serta kondisi terkini hak-hak perempuan.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Cardi B

programme.title: 24 Hours With BTS In L.A.
programme.desc: sebagai fenomena K-pop global dalam kunjungan besar-besaran pertama mereka ke Los Angeles, di mana grup beranggotakan tujuh orang ini disambut oleh kerumunan penggemar yang antusias dan sorotan media yang gencar. Pada suatu malam langka di akhir perjalanan kilat mereka tepat setelah AMAs, dan sebelum tampil di acara Ellen, para anggota grup naik bus pesta bersama Vogue dan mengguncang kota tersebut.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Winnie Harlow

Hari-hari Steinfeld memang penuh dengan kemewahan, tapi dia juga menyempatkan diri untuk hal-hal kecil. Berfoto selfie di Times Square? Kentang goreng dari layanan kamar? Kenapa tidak?

programme.desc: Seorang pemuda dianugerahi kemampuan bela diri yang luar biasa serta kekuatan mistis yang dikenal sebagai Iron Fist.

programme.title: Killer Twin
programme.desc: Kendra mendapat penghargaan guru dan fotonya di koran. Saudara kembar kriminalnya melihat foto itu. Dia menyalahkan Kendra karena ditinggalkan di panti asuhan dan ingin mengambil alih pekerjaan, rumah, dan suami Kendra yang sempurna.

programme.title: Sinister Tales: The Haunting
programme.desc: Sekelompok teman berkumpul untuk saling menceritakan kisah-kisah menyeramkan yang penuh dengan hantu, misteri, dan kejadian supranatural. Namun, ketika malam semakin larut, mereka menyadari bahwa kisah paling mengerikan bukanlah cerita yang mereka ceritakan, melainkan teror nyata yang mulai menghantui mereka satu per satu.

programme.title: Laugh Riot: The Misadventure
programme.desc: Frankie Blair Presents: Laugh Riot adalah serial komedi stand-up yang dinamis dan menghibur, menampilkan beragam komedian dengan gaya humor yang unik. Dipandu oleh Tahir Moore dan diproduseri oleh Frankie Blair, acara berenergi tinggi ini menghadirkan tawa segar sekaligus merayakan talenta-talenta berbakat yang selama ini kurang mendapat sorotan.
Ethan, seorang buruh, dipanggil untuk menemukan obat atas penyakit yang melanda Bumi. Namun ketika dia melakukan perjalanan 407 tahun ke depan, ketakutan terburuknya menjadi nyata.

programme.title: A Missed Connection
programme.desc: Setelah menemukan percikan dengan seorang wanita di peron kereta, seorang fotografer memposting koneksi yang terlewat di surat kabar tetapi tidak pernah mendengar kabar darinya. Lima tahun kemudian, mereka bertemu lagi saat dalam perjalanan ke pernikahan yang sama dengannya.

programme.title: Bidadari Pulau Hantu
programme.desc: Evan dan Gesti melakukan pemotretan pre-wedding di pulau yang dikenal sebagai pulau hantu. Pulau ini terkenal dengan sosok hantu perempuan yang membawa celurit dan menggunakan gaun pengantin.

programme.title: Marina
programme.desc: Anton SH, pengacara muda, dihinggapi rasa ketakutan akan penyakit gila yang menghinggapi ayah dan kakeknya. Karena itu dia takut kawin. Ketika akhirnya ia kawin dengan Marina, dia minta agar istrinya tidak hamil.

programme.title: Ateng asks to marry
programme.desc: Film komedi tentang kisah cinta antara orang tua yang berstatus janda dengan seorang duda, dan juga anak mereka masing masing yang sama sama menjalin kasih. meskipun masing masing harus menjalani hubungan diam diam

programme.title: Mati Muda Di Pelukan Janda
programme.desc: Rahmat yang sejak kecil sudah ditinggal mati oleh kedua orang tuanya, tumbuh besar diasuh oleh seorang pemilik salon, mbak Bunga atau mas Bambang. Tempat tinggalnya berhadapan langsung dengan rumah yang ditempati

programme.title: Three
programme.desc: Menceritakan tentang masa depan di tahun 2036. Dikisahkan oleh tiga sahabat bernama Alif, Lam dan Mim yang ditemukan dengan situasi dimana mereka harus berjuangan atas kebenaran masing-masing.

programme.title: Baby Blues
programme.desc: Sepasang suami-istri, Andika dan Dinda tidak menyangka bahwa merawat bayi tidak semudah yang dibayangkan. Hal ini membuat Dinda mengalami sindrom baby blues yang kemudian memicu perdebatan dan pertengkaran.

programme.title: Warkop Pintar-Pintar Bodoh

programme.title: Warkop Itu Bisa Diatur
programme.desc: Tiga sekawan Dono, Kasino, Indro mendapat kepercayaan membuka restoran karena keahlian Dono memasak. Banyolan pun diambil dari suasana & semua kejadian restoran itu.

programme.title: Obama Anak Menteng
programme.desc: Barry Obama berusia 9 tahun ketika tiba di Menteng. Sebagai anak baru dengan latar belakang campur aduk membuatnya sulit beradaptasi. Persahabatannya dengan anak-anak tetangga, berbeda strata sosial yaitu Slamet dan Yuniardi

programme.title: Nazar
programme.desc: Cindy, cewek trendi yang benar-benar memenangkan mobil mewah dari undian tutup botol, mati-matian berusaha membatalkan nazar asal-asalannya.

programme.title: Sukarno
programme.desc: Soekarno berperan penting dalam kemerdekaan Indonesia, dengan dibantu sahabat-sahabatnya. Dalam kisah ini juga ada sosok perempuan yang selalu mendukung karir dari soekarno yaitu Inggit dan Fatmawati

programme.title: FIFA World Cup 2026
programme.desc: Live 2026 FIFA World Cup coverage from Vancouver as New Zealand take on Egypt. Mohamed Salah once again carries the hopes of a nation on the biggest stage in what could be his final World Cup. After missing out on the 2022 tournament in Qatar, Egypt returns with renewed belief and were held to a draw by Belgium in their opening match. New Zealand, meanwhile, are appearing in only their third World Cup and their first since 2010, when they left the tournament unbeaten but still exited at the group stage. Darren Bazeley's side twice they took the lead against IR Iran but couldn't seal what would have been a crucial win. They now face the much tougher test against one of Africa's strongest sides. Semra Hunter is joined by Jobi McAnuff and Ange Postecoglou. Commentary comes from Sam Matterface and Lee Dixon.

programme.title: Celebrity Lingo
programme.desc: Adil Ray hosts the game of words as Good Morning Britain's Charlotte Hawkins and Sean Fletcher go head-to-head with Cold Feet legends Fay Ripley and John Thomson for charity.

Protesting his innocence, Mike points the finger at a well-known East End gangster who he claims he saw at the scene of the crime. At the trial James Steel is up against eccentric defence barrister Jason Peters. Witness intimidation, false plea bargaining and corruption stand in the way of the truth but in the end, will the decency of one good Samaritan be enough to finally put the murderer away?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When High Court judge Rachel Callaghan is shot and critically injured in an underground car park, the signs point to the job being done by a hitman. But who wanted the judge dead - a notorious criminal or someone a little closer to home? As evidence begins to mount against the prime suspect, Callaghan's health deteriorates and she decides to stop her hospital treatment - a step which would lead to her death. George Castle is torn between friendship and his respect for a person's right to die, as he tries to get Callaghan to accept the truth of what has happened.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series. DCI Vera Stanhope and DS Joe Ashworth investigate a suspicious death in an Army barracks - although the scene has been made to look like a suicide, Vera quickly establishes that Staff Sergeant 'Dev' Deverson was murdered. Sensing a connection to a soldier named Ollie who was killed in Afghanistan, Vera interviews Dev's loyal comrades and Ollie's grieving family while exposing a deeply concealed trauma at the heart of the crime in the process.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: The gripping crime drama series continues with an episode which leads the team to places they could never have imagined as they deal with a shocking crime and its aftermath. When a pregnant junior doctor is found brutally beaten to death in the car park of the hospital where she works, the finger of suspicion points at her boyfriend, Joe Nash, who does not have a firm alibi. Mobile phone traces seem to put him in the right place at the right time but when his therapist Daniela Renzo comes up with an alibi, Ronnie Brooks and Matt Devlin suspect that the couple are having an affair. However, after an arrest, a more harrowing truth comes to light. What first seems like a crime of passion unravels into a frightening conspiracy involving senior government officials, and prosecutors James Steel and Alesha Phillips must get to the bottom of the case before another life is destroyed - even if they have to risk their careers and defy their superiors to do so.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When Ian Parnell, a teenager with severe disabilities and learning difficulties, dies after a fire at his home, Ronnie Brooks and Matt Devlin soon discover that the blaze was not an accident. Ian was taunted and bullied by youths in his area for years and the investigation reveals a multitude of possible perpetrators. However, as Brooks and Devlin look further, the finger of blame begins to point at the last person one might expect. When the case comes to court, complications develop for prosecutors James Steel and Alesha Phillips. They are up against defence lawyer Dominic Peck, who is determined to win at all costs and whose outrageous ego threatens the fair outcome of the trial. As Peck constantly moves the goalposts and misinforms his client, Steel finds himself acting as defence and prosecution at the same time and the consequences of Peck's actions lead to a heart-rending conclusion.

programme.desc: Feature-length drama. When the matriarchal Inkpen family decide to turn Midsomer Deverell's Memorial Garden into a teashop, they dig up more than just the animosity of local villagers - warring families, illegitimacy, sexual liaisons and a potent home brew confront Detective Chief Inspector Tom Barnaby as he investigates a murder in the garden.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When six-month-old baby Alex Raines tragically dies, it seems at first like a case of cot death. However, when the cause of death is later diagnosed as shaken baby syndrome, Ronnie and Matt have a murder investigation on their hands. There are many possible suspects to look at, including the neglectful mother, the absent father, the resentful nanny and her short-tempered boyfriend. When the case reaches court, some new evidence comes to light which casts doubt over the prosecution's case. The very framework of the Raines family is pulled apart and James and Alesha must do some investigating of their own. Pitted against indefatigable barrister Helena Marsden, they must navigate through the family wreckage that Alex's death left behind with little more than a process of elimination to go on. When the truth is uncovered, has this heart-breaking tragedy left more than one victim?

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: A police investigation into a child's disappearance leads officers to a body with a note reading 'They Must be Destroyed.' DS Ronnie Brooks is deeply affected because the note is a terrifying echo of an old case in which he was involved. Six years before, unrepentant racist Andrew Dillon was convicted of killing three young boys from ethnic backgrounds. With Dillon still behind bars, it looks as though there may be a copycat killer picking up where he left off. Or is the reality different - and even more frightening? James Steel finds himself under intense scrutiny when it comes to light that he was the one who successfully prosecuted Dillon for the killings - and that his success was mainly due to 'selective prosecution.' Is Steel guilty of perverting the course of justice? Did he tamper with key evidence in order to win a conviction and secure a promotion?

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series following salvage experts Mike Wolff and Frank Fritz as they travel around America and the rest of the globe trawling junkyards, garages, attics and barns for precious objects. Mike and Frank take their nephew on his first pick and visit an 1890s home that once belonged to an opera singer.

programme.title: The Motorbike Show
programme.desc: Motorcycle enthusiast and writer Henry Cole reviews a film about the Isle of Man TT, checks out the runners and riders on the 2011 British Superbike grid, continues restoring his old Honda and joins Superbike rider Chris Walker as they deliver pizzas.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Dalton rookie Ray Veilleux drives into a trucker's worst nightmare when he's distracted for a second, Lisa roars up the Dalton with an unwieldy bear cage in tow, and trouble is heating up for the Polar Bear when he ignores his poorly loaded cargo.

programme.title: Goodbye, pet
programme.desc: Dick Clement and Ian La Frenais' classic comedy-drama series about a group of British builders in search of employment. Spain turns out to be a bit of a let-down with a distinct lack of the 'action' some of the lads were looking forward to - while the gang have problems with the local police after going swimming in someone's pool thinking that it belongs to Ally Fraser, a British journalist thinks that the lads are a gang of bank robbers on the run and they end up being featured in all the British tabloid newspapers.

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. The teams on a loaded fight card take on their third fight of the qualifiers - some are in dire need of a season-saving victory while others look to storm ahead to a top seeding in the BattleBots VII World Championship tournament. With the selection committee watching their every move, it's up to the bots to deliver show-stopping performances and prove that they belong amongst the best bots in the world - it's nonstop action and carnage, and i all builds to a kill-or-be-killed Main Event between superstars End Game and HyperShock.

programme.title: Bullseye
programme.desc: Freddie Flintoff hosts the classic darts-based game show as he is joined by three pairs of contestants each made up of a keen darts player (the 'thrower') and their partner (the 'knower') - the teams compete against each other by combining their skills at throwing darts at different game boards while answering questions correctly for points and prizes under the watchful eye of official scorer 'Little' Richard Ashdown. All the classic Bullseye rounds are back, including the Category Board, Pounds for Points and Bully's Prize Board, and the winning team will have a big decision to make at the end of the show - to risk everything they've won so far to try to win Bully's Mystery Star Prize. Also joining the fun is world number one Luke Humphries, who partners with Freddie to try to complete a charity challenge.
